# Event logs are auto-generated here by the AI Service.
# Files written at runtime (JSON-Lines format, auto-rotated at 5MB):
#   scrape_events.jsonl   — Scraping runs (source, added, skipped, total)
#   vector_events.jsonl   — Vector index upsert/search events
#   cache_events.jsonl    — Redis cache hit/miss events
#   errors.jsonl          — All error events
#   system.log            — Full application stdout/stderr
